authorization.scope: atomic product project-store cutover, predecessor deletion, real-viewer evidence, and WP-10B exit

outcome: Make the accepted project-store actor and one application service the sole product project-persistence path.
Provide New, Open, Save, Save As, revision-aware autosave, explicit recovery, and durable dirty-close behavior.
Delete the complete project-v15 bridge, CurrentProjectRuntime, direct project-path ownership, their tests, and every live alternate route.
Validate the normal native viewer at 1280x720 and 1920x1080, then accept and tag the exact protected-main WP-10B exit revision.

authority_flip.atomic_merge_rule: product activation and complete predecessor deletion land together in one squash merge; no feature flag, dual route, v15 reader, converter, or fallback survives

product_behavior.new: reuse AttachVerifiedDataset; the actor stays unbound until provisional autosave or initial Save/Create
product_behavior.open: open through the actor, inspect bounded recovery candidates before admission, and admit only a projection matching the verified current source
product_behavior.save: Create when unbound and ManualSave when established; only the exact captured revision becomes saved after durable success, so edit-during-save remains dirty
product_behavior.save_as: allocate a fresh ProjectId, persist exact fork provenance, and switch the live project and destination only after durable success
product_behavior.autosave: use the accepted 30-second idle and 120-second maximum injected-monotonic deadline; expose the next repaint deadline without busy polling
product_behavior.recovery: automatically prompt only for newer same-base autosave; list divergent and manual branches explicitly; every selected recovery opens dirty and Save-As-only
product_behavior.failure: CommitIndeterminate visibly suspends writes until close/reopen; typed read-only and unsupported-filesystem outcomes never select another path
product_behavior.close: dirty Save waits for durable completion before close; source replacement and application exit close and join the actor rather than clearing a path

service_boundary.shape: one actor, one foreground request, one coalesced autosave, one close request, monotonically correlated request IDs, and bounded nonblocking polling
service_boundary.owner: the service owns actor/session/I-O facts while ApplicationState remains the pure revision/history reducer
service_boundary.artifacts: unchanged objects rely only on actor-authenticated generation bindings; genuinely new artifact bytes without one exact source fail visibly
service_boundary.forbidden: request map framework, async runtime, recovery database, maintenance UI, duplicate project state, or filesystem work on interaction frames

private_actor_corrections: Every successful OpenRecovery enters a private RecoverySelected state that rejects ManualSave and Autosave and permits only selected-generation Save As or Close.
Established ManualSave and Autosave inherit omitted fork provenance from the authenticated held manual generation; an explicit mismatch still fails before source reads or mutation.

provisional_recovery_locator.rule: resolve and create only the bounded recovery root before interactive service activation; if neither state root exists, provisional autosave is visibly unavailable while explicit Save/Open remain usable

evidence.trusted: cargo xtask verify-local project-store-lifecycle after focused B4 tests
evidence.product: one bounded multi-launch native scenario: verify, New, initial Save, edit-during-save, real 30-second autosave, external kill, relaunch/recover dirty, Save As, close, and final reopen
evidence.safety: source closure is byte-identical before and after every launch; all failures and attempts remain in the report

invariants: Verified D-009 scientific identity gates attach, open, save, Save As, and autosave.
Application owns live revisions; project-store alone owns paths, sessions, persistence bytes, refs, recovery, leases, and filesystem mutation.
No ref exposes an incomplete closure; source microscopy data is never mutated.
All work remains bounded, cancellable where safe, and stale-suppressing; segmentation remains absent.
non_goals: maintenance or compaction UI, backup administration, migration, stable-format compatibility, or project merge
WP-10A target-storage activation, import, analysis, renderer/UI-root cutovers, settings, segmentation, release hardening, or public-data publication
large or TiB datasets, 4K, paid CI, public self-hosted runners, or additional platform claims
stop_conditions: The cutover would require a public/wire project-store API change, inherited lower-layer API change, compatibility path, source mutation, or retained predecessor.
Recovered state cannot remain dirty and Save-As-only, captured-revision completion cannot preserve edit-during-save dirtiness, or actor shutdown cannot be joined.
The required native multi-launch validation, exact display sizes, source nonmutation, or declared performance thresholds cannot be evidenced.
rollback: Before protected-main merge, revert the whole B4 branch to accepted B3. The squash merge is the no-return authority flip; after it, fix forward without restoring project-v15.
